page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8369B processor with an x86_64 architecture, providing 12 dedicated physical cores and 12 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The CPU configuration includes 48 KB of L1d cache, 1 MB of L2 cache, and 48 MB of L3 cache, alongside support for AVX, AVX-512F, and AVX-512_VNNI instruction sets. The instance is equipped with 48.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it offers a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

Benchmark results place the ecs.g7t.3xlarge in the average performance tier across multiple workloads. The single-core stress-ng CPU performance is measured at 1881.48, while the multi-core performance reaches 11646.62. Memory bandwidth tests show a read-only small block cached speed of 635.14 GB/sec, which drops to 78.98 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, and a write speed of 52.5 GB/sec. In application-specific tests, the instance achieves a Geekbench single-core score of 1600.0 and a multi-core score of 7934.0. It processes Redis SET operations at 12.02 million operations per second and handles static web serving throughput at 17.22 GB/sec. For language model inference, it processes 1080.28 tokens per second for a small 135M model prompt but exhibits weaker performance on medium 7B models, processing prompts at 24.27 tokens per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g7t.3xlarge offers a balanced resource density profile, providing dedicated CPU cores and a standard 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio without the added cost of bundled local storage or specialized GPU accelerators. This makes it a resource-efficient option for workloads that do not require high-speed local NVMe drives. The instance is suited for general-purpose workloads, including static web serving, software compilation, database operations, and lightweight text or image processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring an Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 12 dedicated physical cores and 12 vCPUs at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it includes 48.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core. The instance lacks local storage and dedicated GPUs, but delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate average capabilities, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 7934.0, a Redis SET throughput of 12.02 million operations per second, and static web serving speeds of 17.22 GB/sec. It demonstrates solid performance in software compilation and database operations, though it shows weaker throughput on medium-sized language model prompts. This resource profile makes it a cost-efficient and reliable choice for general-purpose workloads, web serving, and database operations that do not require local NVMe storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 12 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 48 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering reliable performance for databases and web serving.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.3xlarge features 12 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 48 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps bandwidth for general-purpose and database workloads.
tagline: A dedicated twelve-core x86 server with balanced memory and baseline network performance for general-purpose enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 12 dedicated physical cores and 12 vCPUs
48.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core
Baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps with no bundled local storage
Average multi-core performance suitable for software compilation and database operations
Well-suited for static web serving, Redis caching, and general-purpose enterprise applications
